notes: Shows a black screen and plays music
title: Shoppe Keep 2

notes:
Using a non-d3d11 GPU (eg. built-in Intel GPU) will not work at all. With default D3d11 the error "couldn't switch to requested monitor resolution" appeared. Using Wine D3d11 starts the game but only a white screen appears after the splash screen so it's unplayable.

Logs show the following error all over the place:

3291.391:0022:002d:fixme:d3d:wined3d_device_resolve_sub_resource Multisample resolve is not fully supported for typeless formats (dst_format WINED3DFMT_R8G8B8A8_TYPELESS, src_format WINED3DFMT_R8G8B8A8_TYPELESS, format WINED3DFMT_R8G8B8A8_UNORM).
title: Shoppe Keep 2
